## Function
`pkg::fn`

## Version window
- Last safe version (`from_version`):
- First risky version (`to_version`):

## Risk level
[ ] high — output values change silently
[ ] medium — argument renamed/deprecated
[ ] low — minor behavioural note

## Description
Plain-English explanation of what changed and how it affects results.

## Reference
Link to the official NEWS.md or changelog entry:

## Verification
How did you confirm this? (tested on versions X and Y, linked issue, etc.)
